---
id: create-task
title: "Create a task from natural language intent"
description: "Submits a natural language intent to the LLM pipeline. The system classifies intent, resolves primitives, selects a strategy, resolves parameters, generates a concept + condition, binds an action, validates, compiles, and persists a version-pinned Task. Pass dry_run: true to preview without persisting."
sidebar_label: "Create a task from natural language intent"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---
import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a task from natural language intent"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/tasks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Submits a natural language intent to the LLM pipeline. The system classifies intent, resolves primitives, selects a strategy, resolves parameters, generates a concept + condition, binds an action, validates, compiles, and persists a version-pinned Task. Pass dry_run: true to preview without persisting.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
